selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel orthogonality-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the orthogonality admissibility parent into controller-facing fences for explicit partial Orth handling, anti-metric and anti-basis defaults, anti-identity and anti-witness-erasure rules, anti-classical-law boundaries, and future linear-algebra non-escalation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel math-class follow-on after the orthogonality boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the orthogonality-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's partial orthogonality admission rule without importing a complete linear-algebra stack.

candidate_items.name: ORTH_DECLARATIONS_CANNOT_ERASE_WITNESSES_OR_GRANT_SUBSTITUTION

candidate_items.name: NO_CLASSICAL_ORTHOGONALITY_LAW_OR_GLOBAL_ORTHOGONALIZATION

candidate_items.name: FUTURE_LINEAR_ALGEBRA_OVERLAYS_REMAIN_FUTURE_AND_REMOVABLE

quarantined_items.name: ORTHOGONALITY_LANGUAGE_AS_INNER_PRODUCT_OR_HILBERT_DOCTRINE
